body:
J -  Wanted to just let you know i am ever so hopefully  reawakening the guru 
within me 
guru - ing )    Not that it will make a difference  ,  maybe something  if  
just for  the   intelligent  inquisitive  "interest" part of your voluminous 
brain  .  That's one of the things that makes you a far from just  interesting 
kind of man  with your   Brooklyn-ish charm , genius  that you are
If I can't , know i've tried.   We' chat.
    { anything special about your relationship with  your MOTHER ? } 
 
Marcia M.
